lines.english: Speaking the Unspoken Speech, I remain unattached.
From the air came the beginning. This is the age of the True Guru's Teachings.
The Shabad is the Guru, upon whom I lovingly focus my consciousness; I am the chaylaa, the disciple.
O Nanak, throughout the ages, the Lord of the World is my Guru.
I contemplate the sermon of the Shabad, the Word of the One God.
The Gurmukh puts out the fire of egotism. ||44||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਣ ਕੇ ਦੰਤ ਕਿਉ ਖਾਈਐ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: main ke dant kiau khaaeeai saar |
lines.english: "With teeth of wax, how can one chew iron?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਗਰਬੁ ਜਾਇ ਸੁ ਕਵਣੁ ਆਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jit garab jaae su kavan aahaar |
lines.english: What is that food, which takes away pride?

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤ ਉਤ ਕਿਸ ਕਉ ਜਾਣਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: eit ut kis kau jaan samaavai |
lines.english: Who should we know to be pervading here and there?
Where is that cave, within which one may remain unshaken?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਵੈ ਕਾ ਘਰੁ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਅਗਨਿ ਪਿਰਾਹਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: hivai kaa ghar mandar agan piraahan |
lines.english: How can one live in the palace, the home of snow, wearing robes of fire?
and erasing duality, the mortal becomes one with God.
What is that meditation, which leads the mind to be absorbed in itself?" ||45||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹਉ ਮੈ ਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਖੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hau hau mai mai vichahu khovai |
lines.english: Eradicating egotism and individualism from within,
Know the One Lord, inside and out.
The world is difficult for the foolish, self-willed manmukh;
practicing the Shabad, one chews iron.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਗਨਿ ਮਰੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ॥੪੬॥
lines.translit: naanak agan marai satigur kai bhaanai |46|
lines.english: O Nanak, the fire is quenched, through the Pleasure of the True Guru's Will. ||46||
With the True Shabad abiding deep within the heart,
realize that He is One, and contemplate the Shabad.
Imbued with the True Fear of God, pride is taken away;
the body and mind are cooled and soothed, and colored with the Lord's Love.
O Nanak, the Beloved bestows His Glance of Grace. ||47||
The fire of sexual desire, anger and corruption is quenched.
How does the sun blaze so brilliantly?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਮੁਖਿ ਕਾਲੁ ਜੋਹਤ ਨਿਤ ਰਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: kavan mukh kaal johat nit rahai |
lines.english: How can the constant watchful gaze of Death be turned away?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਮੁਖਿ ਚੰਦੁ ਹਿਵੈ ਘਰੁ ਛਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kavan mukh chand hivai ghar chhaaeaa |
lines.english: "The moon of the mind is cool and dark; how is it enlightened?
Give us your thoughtful reply, O Nanak." ||48||
Who is the warrior, who conquers Death?
By what understanding is the honor of the Gurmukh preserved?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਸਿ ਘਰਿ ਸੂਰੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਿਟੈ ਅੰਧਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sas ghar soor vasai mittai andhiaaraa |
lines.english: When the sun dwells in the house of the moon, the darkness is dispelled.
Giving voice to the Shabad, the moon of the mind is illuminated with infinity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਸਮ ਕਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sukh dukh sam kar naam adhaaraa |
lines.english: Pleasure and pain are just the same, when one takes the Support of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
He Himself saves, and carries us across.
and then, prays Nanak, one is not consumed by Death. ||49||
With faith in the Guru, the mind merges in Truth,
Without the Name, one is afflicted by pain and death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਤਤੁ ਸਭ ਹੀ ਸਿਰਿ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: naam tat sabh hee sir jaapai |
lines.english: The essence of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is known to be the most exalted and excellent of all.
When one's essence merges into the essence, the mind is satisfied and fulfilled.
The breath blows across the sky of the Tenth Gate and vibrates.
Duality is gone, and one enters into the home of the One Lord.
O Nanak, the mortal then intuitively meets the eternal, unchanging Lord. ||50||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਥੇ ਸੁੰਨੈ ਜੋ ਨਰੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਪਾਪੁ ਨ ਪੁੰਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: chauthe sunai jo nar jaanai taa kau paap na punan |
lines.english: One who knows the Lord in the fourth state, is not subject to virtue or vice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸੁੰਨੰ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਸੁੰਨੰ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਸੁੰਨ ਮਸੁੰਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: antar sunan baahar sunan tribhavan sun masunan |
lines.english: The absolute Lord is deep within; the absolute Lord is outside us as well. The absolute Lord totally fills the three worlds.
Knows the Primal Being, the Immaculate Divine Lord.
O Nanak, is himself the Primal Lord, the Architect of Destiny. ||51||
That humble being who is imbued with the Immaculate Naam,

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਸੁੰਨ ਕਾ ਜਾਣੈ ਭੇਉ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt sun kaa jaanai bheo |
lines.english: One who knows the mystery of God the Absolute, who pervades each and every heart,
"Everyone speaks of the Absolute Lord, the unmanifest void.
Who are they, who are attuned to this absolute void?"
How can one find this absolute void?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਉਪਜੇ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਜੈਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: jis te upaje tis hee jaise |
lines.english: They are like the Lord, from whom they originated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਮਰਹਿ ਨ ਆਵਹਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: oe janam na mareh na aaveh jaeh |
lines.english: They are not born, they do not die; they do not come and go.
O Nanak, the Gurmukhs instruct their minds. ||52||
By practicing control over the nine gates, one attains perfect control over the Tenth Gate.
There, the unstruck sound current of the absolute Lord vibrates and resounds.
The True Lord is pervading and permeating each and every heart.
Behold the True Lord ever-present, and merge with Him.
